title: Termination, Budgets, Timeouts, and Progress Detection · Control-Loop Lens: Graceful Handoff
summary: Stop an agent safely under success, failure, budget, and no-progress conditions. Planned artifact: Add and verify the loops graceful handoff increment in a loop termination and budget policy. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Stop with a resumable state, evidence, and explicit unmet conditions.
Detect repeated state, unchanged evidence, and oscillating repairs.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
